creator: lausts@acm.org
text:
All of the floppy disk operations (fdformat, DD of an image to floppy,
etc.) don't work on a computer that was running FreeBSD 8.3-RC1.  I
reloaded 8.3-RC1 just to be sure that the hardware was still functional.
FreeBSD 8.3-RC1 works and FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE does not.

Here is my dmesg using FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE:

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Type fdformat on a FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE computer.  It will mark all tracks
on the floppy disk as bad.  Do the same test on the same computer running
FreeBSD 8.3-RC1 and everything will operate normal.
